topStories.description: The AI giant's co-founder confirms that Anthropic briefed the Trump administration on its latest model, Mythos, which it claims has powerful cybersecurity capabilities.

dailyNews.title: Israeli ambassador: Lebanon wants to be liberated from Hezbollah
dailyNews.description: Israel's ambassador to the US said Lebanon revealed a mutual desire to be liberated from Hezbollah.

dailyNews.title: Zelensky Says US Does Not 'Have Time For Ukraine' Because Of Iran War: Report
dailyNews.description: Zelensky said that Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, who have helped broker talks with Moscow on ending Russia's war on Ukraine, were "constantly in talks with Iran" at the moment.

dailyNews.title: US enforces Hormuz blockade after Trump's threat; here's why and how it's being carried out
dailyNews.description: The US has begun enforcing a blockade on ships linked to Iranian ports after Donald Trump’s warning, deploying warships and aircraft to intercept vessels. The move targets Iran’s oil exports and maritime tolls, raising global energy concerns and adding pressure amid stalled negotiations.

dailyNews.title: World Economy Could Be "Thrown Off Course" By War In Middle East: IMF
dailyNews.description: The global economy is set to grow by 3.1 percent this year, said the International Monetary Fund in its World Economic Outlook report, released during its spring meetings in Washington.

dailyNews.title: Explained: Is China Slowly Entering Iran War As US Blockades Hormuz?
dailyNews.description: The failure of Islamabad peace talks and the new counter-blockades that the US has imposed in the Strait of Hormuz have widened the horizon of the West Asia war.

dailyNews.title: "We All Love You": Trump's Huge Praise For PM Modi In Call
dailyNews.description: In their 40-minute call, which was their third phone conversation this year, US President Donald Trump briefed PM Narendra Modi about the situation in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks UK to 'drill, baby, drill’ in North Sea; pressure mounts on Starmer as Iran war pushes oil prices higher
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday asked UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer to 'drill, baby, drill’ in the North Sea as oil prices spike amid the Iran war. The development comes as Starmer faces mounting pressure from members of his cabinet and former PM Tony Blair.

dailyNews.title: ‘Too short to convince’: What really happened at Trump’s dinner with Dutch royals and PM
dailyNews.description: The overnight stay at the White House signals the significance Washington places on its relationship with the Netherlands, even as tensions persist over Iran, NATO, and broader geopolitical challenges.

dailyNews.title: Lula asks US to send ex-intelligence chief to Brazil after ICE arrest
dailyNews.description: Brazil's president says he expects Alexandre Ramagem to be returned to Brazil to serve prison sentence there.

dailyNews.title: In just a couple weeks, StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together

The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it.

There are still a few tickets available to join us and our stacked speaker lineup April 30, so register today!

dailyNews.title: 'DoorDash Grandma' slams paid actor rumors after delivering to President Trump at the White House
dailyNews.description: DoorDash driver Sharon Simmons denied being a paid actor after delivering to President Donald Trump at the White House to mark the "no tax on tips" policy anniversary.

dailyNews.title: DC appeals court orders Judge Boasberg to halt Trump contempt probe over deportation flights
dailyNews.description: The appeals court ruled that a criminal contempt inquiry into actions of Trump officials amounted to a 'clear abuse' of discretion by a federal judge.

dailyNews.title: Lauren Sánchez Bezos defends risqué Trump inauguration look after backlash
dailyNews.description: Lauren Sánchez Bezos breaks silence on inauguration outfit backlash, defending the risqué white lace bra look she wore to Trump's swearing-in ceremony.

dailyNews.title: House Dems unveil bill to examine removing Trump using 25th Amendment
dailyNews.description: House Democrats led by Jamie Raskin introduce a bill to create a commission evaluating whether the 25th Amendment could be used to remove Trump.

dailyNews.title: Kevin Warsh, Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair, Discloses Vast Wealth Ahead of Confirmation Hearing
dailyNews.description: Kevin M. Warsh vowed to divest a substantial amount of his more than $100 million in assets as he faces a complicated path to becoming the next chair of the Federal Reserve.

dailyNews.title: How Stephen Miller Is Adjusting Trump’s Immigration Agenda
dailyNews.description: After the chaos and death that ensued during the deportation raids in Minneapolis, Stephen Miller, the architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign, is changing course on immigration. Our White House correspondent Zolan Kanno-Youngs explains how the administration’s strategy is shifting.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Accuses Biden DOJ of Unfairly Prosecuting Anti-Abortion Activists
dailyNews.description: The report is part of the president’s effort to claim anti-conservative and anti-Christian biases in federal law enforcement, even as he pushes to wield the legal system against his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Takeaways from the Times’s Look Inside D.H.S.
dailyNews.description: Eighty current and former employees talked to us about the Trump administration’s relentless push for mass deportations.

dailyNews.title: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: US proposes 20-year suspension on Iranian uranium enrichment
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  The top internet searches surrounding Trump's now deleted AI post
dailyNews.description: An AI-generated image that President Donald Trump posted Monday on his social media platform that depicted him as a Jesus-like figure is drawing criticism and interest online.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  President Trump and Pope Leo in disagreement over war in Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump and Pope Leo's disagreement over the war in Iran was amplified after Trump attacked the pope on social media and posted a now-deleted AI-generated image that depicted him as a Jesus-like figure.
